Saudi Cricket Stars Enter ILT20: Season 4 Preview

Saudi Cricket Stars Enter ILT20: Season 4 Preview

Saudi Cricket makes history as six players are set to feature in ILT20 Season 4, marking a major milestone for the sport in the Kingdom. The players—Usman Najeeb (Dubai Capitals), Abdul Salam Khan (Sharjah Warriors), Zain Ul Abidin (MI Emirates), Abdul Manan Ali (Abu Dhabi Knight Riders), Faisal Khan (Desert Vipers), and Ishtiaq Ahmad (Gulf Giants)—were officially unveiled at an event in Riyadh on November 18.

Saudi Cricket Partnership with ILT20

The inclusion of Saudi players is possible through a strategic collaboration between the Saudi Arabian Cricket Federation (SACF) and ILT20 management. The partnership aims to identify talent, nurture young cricketers, and develop cricket as a national asset.

Saudi Prince Saud Bin Mishal Al-Saud, chairman of SACF, highlighted cricket’s role in Vision 2030, stating that the initiative contributes to youth empowerment, enhances quality of life, and strengthens non-oil GDP. Collaboration with ILT20’s commercial arm, the Cricket Investment Company (CIC), focuses on creating a sustainable cricket industry in Saudi Arabia.

Key Players Representing Saudi Arabia

Each of the six participating ILT20 teams will feature a Saudi player:

  • Usman Najeeb – Dubai Capitals
  • Abdul Salam Khan – Sharjah Warriors
  • Zain Ul Abidin – MI Emirates
  • Abdul Manan Ali – Abu Dhabi Knight Riders
  • Faisal Khan – Desert Vipers
  • Ishtiaq Ahmad – Gulf Giants

This unprecedented representation allows Saudi players to compete alongside international stars and gain experience under top-level coaching, significantly boosting cricket standards in the Kingdom.

Insights from Cricket Legends

Former international cricketer Waqar Younis praised the initiative:
It’s inspiring to see Saudi Arabia join hands with the ILT20. Playing alongside international stars and learning from top-level coaches will be an invaluable experience for them.

Simon Doull echoed similar enthusiasm, highlighting the value of nurturing regional talent.

ILT20 Season 4 Schedule

Season 4 of the DP World ILT20 is scheduled to begin on December 2, culminating with the final on January 4. The league’s expansion into Saudi talent marks a significant step in elevating the game in the Middle East, aligning with ILT20 chairman Khalid Al Zarooni’s vision to expand cricket across the region.

Looking Ahead for Saudi Cricket

This milestone sets a strong precedent for Saudi Cricket, positioning it on the global stage and providing young athletes with opportunities to train, compete, and excel internationally. The partnership with ILT20 enhances competitive exposure and long-term industry growth, strengthening Saudi Arabia’s presence in world cricket.

Saudi players entering ILT20 reflects the Kingdom’s commitment to sports development and aligns with broader national objectives. This historic participation marks a new era for cricket in Saudi Arabia, inspiring the next generation of players.
